name: Vegan Chicken Salad

ingredients.item: Vietnamese mint, stems removed and roughly chopped
makrut lime leaves, cut into fine threads

method: In a medium skillet, heat 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil over low heat. When hot, add seitan and cook until golden brown on all sides (3 to 5 minutes). Remove and place on a paper towel–lined plate to drain and let cool.
Tear seitan into thin strips along fiber grain, place in a medium bowl, and set aside.
In a medium skillet, heat remaining 3 tablespoons of vegetable oil over medium heat. When hot, add leek and cook and stir until golden brown (1 to 2 minutes). Remove from heat and let cool.
In a small bowl, combine sugar, lime juice, soy sauce, salt, and stock powder (if using). Stir well until all solids are dissolved.
Pour half of the dressing into the bowl of shredded seitan and mix well so seitan will absorb it.
Add fried leek, pepper, Vietnamese mint, lime leaves, and the rest of the dressing. Mix well and serve immediately.
